title: nigritella corneliana var. bourneriasii
intro: Nigritella corneliana var. bourneriasii, also known as Bournerias' Fly Orchid, is a type of orchid that belongs to the Nigritella genus and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, improve appetite, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Nigritella corneliana var. bourneriasii include its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tinctures, infusions, and decoctions, and is typically consumed in small doses due to its potential toxicity.
